description: In the middle of an implementation project, a customer requests a new feature that is outside the original SOW.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the customer's request and review the original SOW to confirm the feature is out of scope.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant validates that the request constitutes a scope change.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the additional effort (hours) required for the new feature.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant provides an accurate estimate for the extra work.

nodes.task_description: Create a change order document outlining the new scope, timeline impact, and additional cost.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant creates a formal change order for the customer to approve.
